DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Vada_icocdc_FF_FL.comment: PID FeedForward coefficient FF for FL damper

Vada_icocdc_FF_FR.comment: PID FeedForward coefficient FF for FR damper

Vada_icocdc_FF_RL.comment: PID FeedForward coefficient FF for RL damper

Vada_icocdc_FF_RR.comment: PID FeedForward coefficient FF for RR damper

lists.0: Vh without rear body height sensor
lists.1: Vh with rear body height sensor

lists.0: Energy for the actuator not allowed
No demand from external damping control (Diag)
lists.1: Nok to an external damping control demand
lists.2: Demand from external damping control satisfied

lists.0: Vh stopped or in forward direction

Nnx_s_ESPInRegTimeCounter.comment: Initialization of the counter in the ESPInRegulation function.

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.

IOCTL.DataIdentifier.comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

lists.0: No MMI alert for degraded mode level 3
lists.1: MMI alert for degraded mode level 3

Mode_3_Alert_C.comment: MMI alert for degraded mode level 3

lists.0: No MMI alert for degraded mode level 4
lists.1: MMI alert for degraded mode level 4

Mode_4_Alert_C.comment: MMI alert for degraded mode level 4

ECU_TEMP_DTC_Threshold.comment: ECU_TEMP_DTC_Threshold : Threshold to get the DTC internal ECU Over temperature : $5D20 $4B

lists.0: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC
